vocabulary.example_sentence: Solar panels turn sunlight into power.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 太阳能电池板把阳光转化为电能。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Turn off the lights to save electricity.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 关灯可以省电。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We use solar energy to heat water.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们用太阳能来加热水。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Wind is another type of clean energy.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 风是另一种清洁能源。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We need to save energy at home and at school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们需要在家里和学校节约能源。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The sun is an important energy source.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 太阳是重要的能源来源。

vocabulary.example_sentence: These bulbs light the classroom with less power.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这些灯泡用更少的电照亮教室。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We use electricity to heat our home in winter.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 冬天我们用电来供暖。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Open the window to cool the room naturally.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 打开窗户让房间自然变凉。

vocabulary.example_sentence: This machine runs on solar power.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这台机器靠太阳能运行。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Water is a precious natural resource.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 水是珍贵的自然资源。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Fossil fuels may run out one day.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 化石燃料总有一天会用完。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Few people unplug chargers when they are not in use.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 很少有人不用充电器时会拔掉插头。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Small habits can change how much energy we use.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 小习惯能改变我们的用电量。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Take a quick shower to save water and energy.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 快淋浴可以节约用水和能源。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A five-minute shower uses less water.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 五分钟淋浴用的水更少。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Please unplug the TV when you leave the room.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 离开房间时请拔掉电视插头。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Turning off the air conditioner makes a big difference.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 关掉空调有很大作用。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We can reduce waste by reusing bottles.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 重复使用瓶子可以减少浪费。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Do not leave the air conditioner on all day.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 不要整天开着空调。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Walking to school is greener than driving every day.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 走路上学比每天开车更环保。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I reuse my water bottle instead of buying a new one.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我重复使用水瓶而不是买新的。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She grows vegetables in her own small garden.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她在自己的小花园里种蔬菜。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We bought fresh fruit at the local market.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在当地集市买了新鲜水果。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Wash the bottle and use it again.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 把瓶子洗干净再用一次。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Put the lid on top of the jar tightly.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 把盖子紧紧盖在罐子上。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Solar power is useful in sunny places.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 太阳能在阳光充足的地方很有用。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Dirty rivers show that we need to protect nature.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 脏河流说明我们需要保护大自然。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Plant trees on both sides of the road.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 在路两边种树。
